subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Pandemic Preparedness
description: A quick, practical guide to Pandemic Preparedness.

hook.text: The question isn't if another pandemic will come. It's when—and whether we'll be ready this time.

buildup.text: Pandemic preparedness includes surveillance systems, stockpiles, communication plans, and research infrastructure.

discovery.text: Genomic sequencing can now identify a new pathogen within days—the 2020 COVID genome was sequenced in 2 weeks.

twist.text: Most countries had pandemic plans before COVID-19. Most failed to follow them when the time came.

climax.text: mRNA vaccine platforms can be adapted to new pathogens in weeks—a revolution in rapid response.

punchline.text: We have the tools. We had the plans. Next time, we need the will.

quiz.question: What key lesson emerged from the COVID-19 pandemic about preparedness?
options: Having plans isn't enough—countries must follow them when the time comes
